w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: ETPL Admin Panel â€” Operations Runbook
Central landing page after login. Displays 6 real-time KPI stat cards with clickable links to key modules.
The left sidebar is always visible and
Customers: Customer Master, Vendor Master, ARC Master, Survey Templates, BOQ Templates
HR Operations: Role Master, Employee Master, Attendance Master, Types of Leave, Leave Master, Holiday List
Operations: Site Master, BOQ Master, Expense Master
Create and manage all customer/client records including contact details, address, KYC, and optional bank details.
Columns: Customer ID (e.g. CUST00022), Name, Email, Mobile, Action
Actions per row: Edit, Toggle Status (Active / Inactive), Delete
Search: Real-time filter bar across all columns
.2 Workflow â€” Add a New Customer
Navigate to Sidebar > Customers > Customer Master.
Click the "+ Add Customer" button (top-right of list view).
Fill all mandatory fields marked with a red asterisk (*).
Select State from the dropdown, then select District (unlocks after State is chosen).
Enter KYC details: PAN, GST (validated format 22AAAAA0000A1Z5), and 12-digit Aadhar.
Optionally fill Bank Details: Account Holder Name, Bank Name, IFSC Code, Account Number.
The new record appears immediately in the list with an auto-generated Customer ID.
In the list view, click the Edit (pencil) icon on the desired row.
The form pre-populates with all saved data.
Click "Update". Changes reflect immediately in the list.
Full legal name. e.g. ABC Infrastructure Ltd
Street or area name. e.g. MG Road
Email must be a valid format â€” browser-level validation on submit.
GST must exactly match pattern 22AAAAA0000A1Z5 â€” system rejects any other format.
District dropdown is disabled until a State is selected.
All * fields must be completed before form will submit.
Manage all vendor/supplier records. Bank details are mandatory for all vendors (unlike Customer Master). Supports multiple contact persons per vendor.
Vendor Type field added; all Bank Details are mandatory (vs. optional in Customer Master)
.1 Workflow â€” Add a New Vendor
Navigate to Sidebar > Customers > Vendor Master.
Select Vendor Type: Other / Civil / Electric / Labor.
Fill all mandatory fields including address and KYC details.
Fill all four Bank Detail fields â€” these are mandatory for vendors.
To add a contact person, click "+ Add Contact Person". Enter Name (mandatory), Email, Phone, Designation.
Repeat for multiple contacts. Use trash icon to remove any.
Click "Submit". Record saved with auto-generated Vendor ID.
GST format â€” error: "Please enter a valid GST".
Contact Person Name mandatory if section used.
All Bank Detail fields mandatory â€” form will not submit if empty.
Manage the Asset Resource Component (ARC) catalogue â€” equipment, materials, and components with regional pricing tiers and validity date ranges.
Enter Equipment Name, Code, UOM, and Make.
Enter Base Price and optional regional prices (East, West, North, South).
Select Valid From date using calendar widget (mm/dd/
Select Valid To date â€” must be after Valid From.
" â€” record appears with Active status.
Upload file â€” system validates and imports rows.
Valid From must be selected â€” error: "Please select valid from date".
Valid To must be after Valid From â€” error: "Please select valid to date".
Build dynamic multi-section survey and questionnaire templates. Field staff complete these via the mobile app for site assessments, inspections, and customer surveys.
.1 Workflow â€” Create a Survey Template
Navigate to Sidebar > Customers > Survey Templates.
Enter a Title for the survey (mandatory).
Select the associated Customer from the dropdown (mandatory).
Click "+ Add Section" and enter a Section Title (e.g. Site Information).
Within the section, click "+ Add Question".
Enter Question text and select Answer Type: Text / Radio / Checkbox / Dropdown / File.
Repeat to add more questions within the same section.
Click "+ Add Section" to create additional sections.
Use trash icon to delete questions or sections if needed.
Create reusable Bill of Quantities (BOQ) templates per customer. Templates define standard line items that can be applied across multiple projects.
.1 Workflow â€” Create a BOQ Template
Navigate to Sidebar > Customers > BOQ Templates.
Enter Template Name and select Customer.
Add line items using row-add button.
For each row enter Item Description, Quantity, Unit, Unit Price.
Template becomes available in BOQ Master.
roles used for employee access control and task assignment throughout the system
nly Admin will have access to this and no one can modify/add new role - any change will need coding
Configuration module â€” predefined roles are used during Employee creation.
Full employee lifecycle management. 9-section structured form covering personal details, KYC, compensation, education, family, manager, and assets.
.1 Workflow â€” Add a New Employee
Navigate to Sidebar > HR Operations > Employee Master.
.3 Section 2 â€” Permanent Address & Emergency Contact
.4 Section 3 â€” Current Address & Personal Details
Upload file â€” system validates and imports rows.
View and manage employee attendance records. Check-in and check-out are submitted via the mobile app from the work site.
Employee ID as set in Employee Master
.2 Workflow â€” Filter and View Attendance
Navigate to Sidebar > HR Operations > Attendance Master.
Select Start Date and End Date using date pickers.
Configuration module to define leave categories and yearly allotment of days.
Sidebar > HR Operations > Types of Leave
.2 Workflow â€” Add a Leave Type
Enter Yearly Leave allotment (number of days).
Leave type becomes available in Leave Master.
Click Edit on existing leave type.
Changes apply to future leave requests.
Can't modify leave type, only Allotment can be changed.
Manage employee leave applications. Displays all requests with Pending / Approved / Rejected status. Managers review and take action from this module.
Pending Leave Approval count is shown on Dashboard and requires manager action.
.2 Workflow â€” Approve or Reject Leave Request
Navigate to Leave Master or click Dashboard Pending Leave card.
Review request details (employee, type, date, reason).
Enter Admin Remark (e.g. Approved as per policy).
Maintain company holiday calendar. Holidays affect attendance calculations and leave counting.
Holiday reflects in attendance and leave logic.
Manage all project and work sites. Field staff select their site when logging attendance and submitting reports via the mobile app.
Total Sites count is displayed on Dashboard.
Site becomes available in mobile app.
Upload file â€” system validates and imports rows.
Create and manage project-specific Bill of Quantities (BOQs). Used for costing, procurement, and project tracking.
Columns: Date, Customer, Site, State, Total Amount, Items
Data spans multiple customers and regions
Review or add items in table.
Enter Quantity and Unit Price per item.
Manage employee expense claims and reimbursements. Field staff submit claims via the mobile app. Managers review and approve or reject with remarks.
Pending Expense Approval count is displayed on Dashboard and requires manager action.
.1 Workflow â€” Approve or Reject an Expense Claim
Navigate to Expense Master or click "Pending Expense Approval" from Dashboard.
Click on a claim to open detail view.
Review Expense Date, Category, Amount, Description, and Receipt.
Click receipt link to view uploaded image.
Employee receives notification via mobile app.
Expense submitted via mobile app or admin panel
Can view details, Approve/Reject, add remarks
Can view manager remarks, Approve/Reject, modify amount
Fields visible: Actual Amount (submitted), Approved Amount (final)
Dynamic sections use Add (+) and Delete (trash).
